name: lifebridge
description: Gemini-powered universal bridge: unstructured input to structured life-saving actions

scripts.test:fast: tsc && node --test dist/tests/geminiParser.test.js dist/tests/inputNormalizer.test.js dist/tests/inputProcessor.test.js dist/tests/locationEnricher.test.js dist/tests/outputFormatter.test.js dist/tests/server.test.js dist/tests/speechToText.test.js dist/tests/textToSpeech.test.js dist/tests/translation.test.js
scripts.quality:check: pnpm run lint:strict && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:fast
scripts.quality:full: pnpm run lint:strict && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:full
